recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Music, Romance
recommendations.overview: Three fairy tale princesses find themselves engaged to the same guy, Prince Charming.

recommendations.overview: A family loaded with quirky, colorful characters piles into an old van and road trips to California for little Olive to compete in a beauty pageant.

recommendations.title: Priceless
recommendations.overview: A beautiful young gold-digger mistakes a lowly hotel clerk as a rich and therefore worthwhile catch.

recommendations.title: A Wonderful World
recommendations.overview: A fairy tale about the political and socioeconomic realities of Mexico.

recommendations.title: The Platform 2
recommendations.overview: After a mysterious leader imposes his law in a brutal system of vertical cells, a new arrival battles against a dubious food distribution method.

recommendations.title: Father Frost
recommendations.overview: A fairy tale about a conceited young man and a young woman with a tyrannical step-mother, who must overcome magical trials in order to be together.

recommendations.title: Be Careful What You Wish For
recommendations.overview: Pamela is an eight-year-old girl who loves horror movies and fairy tales. When his uncle gives her away a doll named "Hellequin" as a birthday gift, a tale of betrayal begins to unfold before her eyes.

recommendations.title: The Marquez-Castillo Siblings
recommendations.overview: A group of four siblings compete for the heritage of their father.
